title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
